notes.seemings: Each seeming has a Blessing (a creation-time bonus) and a Curse (a Clarity-damage trigger added to breaking points). The dice pool for the Curse is half Wyrd rounded up.
notes.kiths: Each kith provides a Blessing — a specific supernatural ability. A changeling may take any kith regardless of seeming, but each seeming's kiths are most thematically aligned.
notes.courts: The four seasonal courts. Most freeholds in the published setting use the seasonal-court structure.
notes.needles_threads: Needles and Threads are free-form personal expressions of identity, not enumerated. See Changeling: The Lost 2e p.95.
notes.kithBlessingsAccuracy: Kith Blessing text is summarized for in-game listing. Consult Changeling: The Lost 2e for full mechanical text before adjudicating an effect.

seemings.name: Beast
seemings.blessing: Gain +1 to one Resistance Attribute (Stamina, Resolve, or Composure) at creation.
seemings.curse: Suffers Clarity damage when forced to act against an animal nature — caged, denied instinct, kept from prey or pack. Pool: half Wyrd, round up.
seemings.description: Stolen and remade to resemble or behave as an animal. Predators, prey, companions, mounts — whatever beast the Keeper needed.

seemings.name: Darkling
seemings.blessing: Gain +1 to one Finesse Attribute (Dexterity, Wits, or Manipulation) at creation.
seemings.curse: Suffers Clarity damage when exposed to bright, sustained, scrutinizing light — interrogation lamps, daylight on a stage, the unblinking sun. Pool: half Wyrd, round up.
seemings.description: Hidden in shadow, silence, and secret. Servants of moonless courts, librarians of forbidden lore, the things that go bump in the night.

seemings.name: Elemental
seemings.blessing: Gain +1 to one Resistance Attribute (Stamina, Resolve, or Composure) at creation.
seemings.curse: Suffers Clarity damage when wounded by their opposing element, or when forced to remain long apart from their own. Pool: half Wyrd, round up.
seemings.description: Embodiments of elemental forces — fire, water, stone, air, metal, weather. Made from the raw stuff of Faerie.

seemings.name: Fairest
seemings.blessing: Gain +1 to one Power Attribute (Strength, Intelligence, or Presence) at creation.
seemings.curse: Suffers Clarity damage when slighted, ignored, or treated as unwanted — a wound to the vanity their Keeper carved into them. Pool: half Wyrd, round up.
seemings.description: Made for beauty, art, and influence. Trophies and courtiers, performers and seducers. Their grace cuts as deeply as their wounds.

seemings.name: Ogre
seemings.blessing: Gain +1 to one Power Attribute (Strength, Intelligence, or Presence) at creation.
seemings.curse: Suffers Clarity damage when bullied, browbeaten, or forced to back down from a confrontation they could otherwise win. Pool: half Wyrd, round up.
seemings.description: Built to break and crush — soldiers, executioners, monsters, brawlers. Their bodies bear the marks of the violence they were made for.

seemings.name: Wizened
seemings.blessing: Gain +1 to one Finesse Attribute (Dexterity, Wits, or Manipulation) at creation.
seemings.curse: Suffers Clarity damage when their craft is dismissed, devalued, or visibly outdone by an amateur or a machine. Pool: half Wyrd, round up.
seemings.description: Made small and skilled — craftspeople, servants, scholars, performers. Twisted into useful shapes for tedious work.

kiths.name: Broadback
kiths.blessing: Treat Size as one higher than normal for Encumbrance and Stamina-vs-fatigue rolls.
kiths.description: Beasts of burden — patient, enduring, slow to anger but devastating when roused.

kiths.name: Cleareyes
kiths.blessing: Ignore visibility penalties in darkness, smoke, or low light; +2 to perception rolls involving sight.
kiths.description: Hunters with preternatural senses; bird-of-prey or wolf-keen vision.

kiths.name: Coldscale
kiths.blessing: Resist environmental cold and toxins; treat Stamina as +1 for resisting poison.
kiths.description: Reptilian and amphibian shapes — calculating, cold-blooded, patient.

kiths.name: Helldiver
kiths.blessing: Hold breath far longer than human; suffer no penalty for working in deep, dark, or pressurized spaces.
kiths.description: Deep-sea or subterranean creatures — silent, lightless places.

kiths.name: Hunterheart
kiths.blessing: Gain a natural attack (claw, bite, or talons) that deals lethal damage at Strength + Brawl.
kiths.description: Predator-touched — wolves, big cats, raptors. Quick to strike.

kiths.name: Roteater
kiths.blessing: Eat spoiled, rotten, or poisoned food without ill effect; +2 to resist disease.
kiths.description: Carrion eaters — vultures, hyenas, rats. Thrive on what others discard.

kiths.name: Skitterskulk
kiths.blessing: Climb sheer surfaces at half speed without a Dexterity + Athletics roll; +2 to stealth in tight spaces.
kiths.description: Insectile and arachnid — many legs, chitinous shells, swarming.

kiths.name: Steepscrambler
kiths.blessing: Halve the difficulty of climb and leap rolls; never suffer falling damage from less than 3 stories.
kiths.description: Climbers — goats, monkeys, lizards. At home on cliffs and rooftops.

kiths.name: Swimmerskin
kiths.blessing: Swim at full Speed; hold breath three times longer than normal.
kiths.description: Aquatic — fish, otters, seals. Most at ease in water.

kiths.name: Truefriend
kiths.blessing: Gain +2 to Social rolls intended to comfort, calm, or earn loyalty from a single chosen companion.
kiths.description: Domesticated companions — dogs, cats, horses. Loyalty is their nature.

kiths.name: Venombite
kiths.blessing: Once per scene, deliver a venomous bite or touch — Toxicity equals Wyrd.
kiths.description: Venomous — snakes, spiders, jellyfish. Their touch carries poison.

kiths.name: Windwing
kiths.blessing: Glide short distances safely; +2 to Athletics rolls involving balance, leaping, or falling.
kiths.description: Birds — flight, sharp eyes, song. Free in a way few Beasts are.

kiths.name: Antiquarian
kiths.blessing: Once per scene, recall a relevant piece of obscure lore; gain +2 to research-oriented rolls.
kiths.description: Keepers of forgotten lore — librarians, archivists, scholars of the dead.

kiths.name: Gravewight
kiths.blessing: +2 to Social rolls with the recently dead, the dying, or those who deal in death.
kiths.description: Touched by death — pale, cold, comfortable in cemeteries and morgues.

kiths.name: Leechfinger
kiths.blessing: Spend Glamour to drain Willpower from a willing or restrained target on touch — 1 Glamour : 1 WP.
kiths.description: Their touch drains warmth, vitality, or memory.

kiths.name: Lurker
kiths.blessing: +2 to Stealth in any environment with cover, shadow, or crowd.
kiths.description: Unnoticed watchers — the eyes you never see, the listener in the hall.

kiths.name: Lurkglider
kiths.blessing: Drop safely from any height under 4 stories; +2 to Stealth when attacking from above.
kiths.description: Silent gliders — flying squirrels, bats. Drop from above without warning.

kiths.name: Mirrorskin
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to alter your Mask to resemble any human you have seen, for one scene.
kiths.description: Reflective and changeable — impersonators, infiltrators, faces that aren't theirs.

kiths.name: Nightsinger
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to lull a listener to sleep with song; resist with Composure + Wyrd of singer.
kiths.description: Voices in the dark — lullabies, dirges, whispers that compel.

kiths.name: Palewraith
kiths.blessing: Pass through narrow gaps as if size 1; +2 to Stealth in low light.
kiths.description: Ghost-like — translucent, drifting, half-here.

kiths.name: Razorhand
kiths.blessing: Natural weapon (claws) deals lethal damage at Strength + Brawl; ignore 1 point of armor.
kiths.description: Blade-fingered — fingers as knives, claws, talons.

kiths.name: Tunnelgrub
kiths.blessing: Burrow through soft earth at half Speed without tools; +2 to escape restraints.
kiths.description: Burrowing things — moles, worms, sewer-dwellers. At home below.

kiths.name: Whisperwisp
kiths.blessing: Once per session, recall a relevant rumor or secret about a person, place, or event.
kiths.description: Carry secrets and rumors — every Whisperwisp knows something useful.

kiths.name: Airtouched
kiths.blessing: Move without slowing through wind, dust, or smoke; +2 to Speed when on open ground.
kiths.description: Wind, storm, and breath. Hair that streams, voices that howl.

kiths.name: Earthbones
kiths.blessing: +2 Size against being moved, knocked down, or thrown; reduce bashing damage by 1.
kiths.description: Stone, mountain, soil. Slow, solid, patient as continents.

kiths.name: Fireheart
kiths.blessing: Resist fire damage; spend 1 Glamour to ignite a small object on touch.
kiths.description: Flame and forge. Warm to touch, quick to rage, slow to forgive.

kiths.name: Levinquick
kiths.blessing: Once per scene, add +3 Initiative; resist electrical damage.
kiths.description: Lightning and electricity. Quick-tempered, charge in the air around them.

kiths.name: Manikin
kiths.blessing: Take only bashing damage from non-magical attacks; need not eat or sleep but suffer at lower Glamour.
kiths.description: Living constructs — clockwork, wood, porcelain. Made, not born.

kiths.name: Metalflesh
kiths.blessing: Treat unarmored skin as Armor 1/0; ignore the first point of lethal damage per scene.
kiths.description: Metal-bodied — iron, copper, gold. Hard, heavy, dense.

kiths.name: Snowskin
kiths.blessing: Resist cold environments and ice; spend 1 Glamour to chill a touched object or person.
kiths.description: Cold and ice — pale skin, frost-breath, winter in their bones.

kiths.name: Sunwhisper
kiths.blessing: Shed light equal to a lantern at will; +2 to rolls to dispel illusion or reveal hidden things.
kiths.description: Sunlight and warmth. They glow faintly in mortal sight.

kiths.name: Waterborn
kiths.blessing: Hold breath three times longer; swim at full Speed; cannot drown in calm water.
kiths.description: Rivers, seas, rain. Fluid, persistent, shaping what they touch.

kiths.name: Woodblood
kiths.blessing: Heal lethal damage at the bashing rate while in contact with living plant matter.
kiths.description: Trees, vines, growing things. Patient, rooted, green in the veins.

kiths.name: Bright One
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to fill a room with light; +2 to Presence rolls when first seen.
kiths.description: Radiant — they shine with an inner light. Drawing eyes wherever they go.

kiths.name: Dancer
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to add +3 Defense for one turn; +2 to Athletics rolls involving balance or grace.
kiths.description: Grace incarnate — movement that compels, performance that enchants.

kiths.name: Draconic
kiths.blessing: +2 to Intimidation rolls; once per scene, treat Size as one higher for fear effects.
kiths.description: Dragon-touched — regal, proud, faintly scaled. Commanding presence.

kiths.name: Flamesiren
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to compel a romantically interested target to remain in your presence for one scene.
kiths.description: Beauty edged with danger — those drawn to them often burn.

kiths.name: Flowering
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to release a scent that calms (+2 to Social) or intoxicates (-2 Resolve) at choice.
kiths.description: Blossom-touched — fragrant, delicate, briefly perfect.

kiths.name: Gandharva
kiths.blessing: +2 to Expression rolls involving music or song; song can carry minor magical effects at Storyteller discretion.
kiths.description: Musical spirits — voice, instrument, song. They move others to tears or war.

kiths.name: Larcenist
kiths.blessing: +2 to Larceny and Subterfuge; once per scene, palm a small object unnoticed.
kiths.description: Thieves of hearts and treasures. They take what they want with a smile.

kiths.name: Muse
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to grant a target +2 to their next Expression or Crafts roll.
kiths.description: Inspirers — their presence kindles creativity in others.

kiths.name: Playmate
kiths.blessing: +2 to Social rolls with children or those of childlike disposition; resist age-related effects.
kiths.description: Eternally youthful — companions, confidants, dolls grown into something.

kiths.name: Polychromatic
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to shift color of self or worn items; +2 to Stealth in visually busy environments.
kiths.description: Iridescent — colors shift across skin, hair, eyes. Always changing, never the same.

kiths.name: Romancer
kiths.blessing: +2 to Persuasion rolls in intimate or one-on-one contexts; recover Willpower from successful seductions.
kiths.description: Born to be loved — and to love. Their affection is intoxicating, dangerous.

kiths.name: Shadowsoul
kiths.blessing: +2 to Social rolls under moonlight or in twilight; spend 1 Glamour to dim ambient light briefly.
kiths.description: Beautiful and dark — twilight grace, cold elegance, the chill of the moon.

kiths.name: Telluric
kiths.blessing: Once per session, ask the Storyteller a yes/no question about an impending event; receive a partial answer.
kiths.description: Star-touched — astrological, distant, fated. The cosmos in their eyes.

kiths.name: Treasured
kiths.blessing: +2 to resist Mind-affecting effects when defending a personal token or oath.
kiths.description: Made to be owned and displayed — gemlike, perfect, often miserable.

kiths.name: Bloodbrute
kiths.blessing: Once per scene, ignore the first point of wound penalty in combat.
kiths.description: Slaughterers — built for raw, bloody violence.

kiths.name: Cyclopean
kiths.blessing: +2 to ranged-attack rolls with thrown weapons; ignore the off-hand penalty.
kiths.description: One-eyed and giant — towering, single-minded, terrible.

kiths.name: Farwalker
kiths.blessing: +2 Speed when traveling overland; never fatigue from long marches without combat.
kiths.description: Wandering giants — long legs, longer roads. Hard to outrun.

kiths.name: Gargantuan
kiths.blessing: Treat Size as one higher than normal; +1 Health.
kiths.description: Simply enormous — they stoop in doorways, fold to sit in chairs.

kiths.name: Gristlegrinder
kiths.blessing: Bite attack deals lethal damage at Strength + Brawl; consume bone and gristle harmlessly.
kiths.description: Eaters of flesh and bone — cannibals, butchers, things with too many teeth.

kiths.name: Mottled
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to shift visible skin pattern for camouflage; +2 to Stealth.
kiths.description: Patchwork — many skins stitched together, many sources, many smells.

kiths.name: Render
kiths.blessing: Unarmed attacks deal lethal damage; +1 to damage rolls when grappling.
kiths.description: Tearers — claws, tusks, hooks. They unmake what they touch.

kiths.name: Stonebones
kiths.blessing: Treat unarmored skin as Armor 1/1; reduce knockback by half.
kiths.description: Made of stone — heavy, slow, nearly unkillable.

kiths.name: Trollkith
kiths.blessing: +2 to Resolve rolls to hold ground; recover bashing damage at the lethal rate.
kiths.description: Bridge-keepers and toll-takers — ugly, loud, oddly hospitable on their terms.

kiths.name: Water-Dweller
kiths.blessing: Hold breath three times longer; deal lethal damage in grapples performed underwater.
kiths.description: Brutish things from deep, dark water — kelpies, drowners, river-haunts.

kiths.name: Witchtooth
kiths.blessing: Once per scene, curse a touched target — they suffer -1 to their next significant roll.
kiths.description: Hags and crones — sharp teeth, sharper magic, oldest tricks.

kiths.name: Artist
kiths.blessing: +2 to one chosen Crafts or Expression specialty; finished works briefly hold a glamour.
kiths.description: Made to create art for a Keeper's pleasure — painters, sculptors, weavers.

kiths.name: Author
kiths.blessing: +2 to Academics rolls involving the written word; can read in any human-derived script.
kiths.description: Made to write — scribes, copyists, the keepers of records nobody reads.

kiths.name: Brewer
kiths.blessing: +2 to Crafts rolls involving brewing/distilling; can taste-identify a poison instantly.
kiths.description: Distillers and apothecaries — wine, beer, potion, poison.

kiths.name: Chatelaine
kiths.blessing: +2 to Social rolls within a household or establishment they are trusted within.
kiths.description: Household managers — servants of grand houses, keepers of keys and ledgers.

kiths.name: Chirurgeon
kiths.blessing: +2 to Medicine rolls; spend 1 Glamour to downgrade 1 point of damage on a touched patient.
kiths.description: Surgeons of the Hedge — they cut, stitch, replace. Sometimes they improve.

kiths.name: Drudge
kiths.blessing: +2 to Stamina rolls to endure exhaustion, hunger, or thirst.
kiths.description: Worn to nubs by endless labor — porters, scrubbers, diggers.

kiths.name: Fatemaker
kiths.blessing: Once per session, force a re-roll on your own failed roll (the second result stands).
kiths.description: Spinners of luck — gamblers, fortune-tellers, makers of small miracles.

kiths.name: Gameplayer
kiths.blessing: +2 to Subterfuge rolls in games, contests, or wagers; cheat once per scene undetected.
kiths.description: Tricksters — riddles, contests, wagers. They cheat, but elegantly.

kiths.name: Gremlin
kiths.blessing: Once per scene, cause a non-magical mechanical or electronic device to malfunction on touch.
kiths.description: Breakers of machines — saboteurs, vandals, things that go wrong.

kiths.name: Inventor
kiths.blessing: +2 to Crafts rolls for original creation; spend 1 Glamour to jury-rig a tool from scrap in one minute.
kiths.description: Tinkerers and engineers — clockwork, gears, impossible engines.

kiths.name: Mirror
kiths.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to mimic a person's voice and mannerisms for one scene after observing them briefly.
kiths.description: Impersonators — they wore many faces in Faerie, and the habit didn't break.

kiths.name: Notary
kiths.blessing: Detect when a sworn promise is broken; +2 to Persuasion in contractual or legal contexts.
kiths.description: Witnesses, scribes, certifiers — every contract bears their seal.

kiths.name: Oracle
kiths.blessing: Once per session, glimpse a brief omen about a chosen subject (Storyteller defines).
kiths.description: Diviners — entrails, cards, dreams. They see truths better forgotten.

kiths.name: Smith
kiths.blessing: Crafted items by the Smith last longer and resist damage; +2 to Crafts (metalworking).
kiths.description: Forgers — iron, gold, glass. Their tools never break, and their bargains hold.

kiths.name: Soldier
kiths.blessing: +2 to one chosen Weaponry or Firearms specialty; resist combat-related fear effects.
kiths.description: Tiny but trained — generations of war-craft compressed into small bodies.

kiths.name: Woodwalker
kiths.blessing: +2 to Survival and Animal Ken rolls in any wilderness; track at half normal difficulty.
kiths.description: Foresters — keepers of paths, gardeners of wild places, friends of beasts.

courts.name: Spring
courts.mantleNotes: Mantle manifests as fresh blossoms, warmth, sweet scents.
courts.contractDiscount: Spring Court members buy Contracts of the Spring Court at full cost; affinity for emotional and persuasive Contracts.
courts.description: Court of desire and renewal. Spring courtiers chase joy, beauty, and new beginnings as armor against the despair of capture.

courts.name: Summer
courts.mantleNotes: Mantle manifests as heat, dry winds, the smell of dust and smoke.
courts.contractDiscount: Summer Court members buy Contracts of the Summer Court at full cost; affinity for combat and forceful Contracts.
courts.description: Court of wrath and endurance. Summer's heat is a forge; its anger is a shield against fear.

courts.name: Autumn
courts.mantleNotes: Mantle manifests as cold winds, falling leaves, a deepening of shadows.
courts.contractDiscount: Autumn Court members buy Contracts of the Autumn Court at full cost; affinity for knowledge, fear, and goblin Contracts.
courts.description: Court of fear and knowledge. Autumn studies what terrifies it — the Fae most of all — and wields that knowledge as power.

courts.name: Winter
courts.mantleNotes: Mantle manifests as creeping cold, frost on glass, hushed quiet.
courts.contractDiscount: Winter Court members buy Contracts of the Winter Court at full cost; affinity for stealth, mourning, and silence Contracts.
courts.description: Court of sorrow and silence. Winter survives by hiding, by mourning, by becoming small and unseen.
